variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHR56140 Return Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon TXW8CGDL10B
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHR56140 Return Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon TXW8CGDL10B
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHR56140 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Fairey Arlon TXW8CGDL10B. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHR56140
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 126.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 92.0 mm, Length: 480.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 53281 Return Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon TXW8CGDL10B
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 53281 Return Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon TXW8CGDL10B
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 53281 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 126.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 92.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 9.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 480.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 22.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 126.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 92.0 mm, Length: 480.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.option1Value: Filtrec R732G10P Return Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon TXW8CGDL10B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R732G10P. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R732G10P provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
